nodes.title: Input Settings Guide
widgets_values:
# Input Settings Guide

Configure these settings before running the WAN VACE Auto Joiner workflow.

---

## 📁 Directory and Filenames

### Folder
The full path to the folder containing your video clips.

**Example:** `D:\Skateboard`

---

### Filename Prefix
The prefix used in your video filenames (without the underscore or number).

**Example:** If your files are named `wan_00001.mp4`, `wan_00002.mp4`, etc., enter `wan`

---

### First Filename Suffix
The number of the **first** video clip in your sequence.

**Example:** If starting with `wan_00001.mp4`, enter `1`

---

### Last Filename Suffix
The number of the **last** video clip in your sequence.

**Example:** If ending with `wan_00008.mp4`, enter `8`

> 💡 **Tip:** For 8 videos numbered 1-8, set First = `1` and Last = `8`. The workflow will process all 8 videos with 7 VACE transitions.

---

## 📐 Video Dimensions

### Width
The width of your video clips in pixels.

**Example:** `1120`

> ⚠️ All video clips must have the same width.

---

### Height
The height of your video clips in pixels.

**Example:** `640`

> ⚠️ All video clips must have the same height.

---

## 🎬 Video Properties

### Length
The number of frames for VACE processing. 

**Default:** `33` (recommended — do not change unless you know what you're doing)

---

### Frame Rate
The frame rate (FPS) of your video clips.

**Example:** `16.0`

> 💡 This value is passed to the final video output node to maintain proper playback speed.

---

## Quick Reference

| Setting | Description | Example |
|---------|-------------|---------|
| Folder | Path to video clips | `D:\Skateboard` |
| Filename Prefix | File prefix without number | `wan` |
| First Filename Suffix | First video number | `1` |
| Last Filename Suffix | Last video number | `8` |
| Width | Video width in pixels | `1120` |
| Height | Video height in pixels | `640` |
| Length | VACE frame count | `33` |
| Frame Rate | Video FPS | `16.0` |

---

## Example File Structure

With the settings shown above, your folder should contain:

```
D:\Skateboard\
├── wan_00001.mp4
├── wan_00002.mp4
├── wan_00003.mp4
├── wan_00004.mp4
├── wan_00005.mp4
├── wan_00006.mp4
├── wan_00007.mp4
└── wan_00008.mp4
```

All videos should be **1120×640** at **16 FPS**.
